g.text: Protobuf Wire Format -- the same payload, half the bytes
Same logical record. JSON repeats keys, quotes, commas. Protobuf encodes tag-varint-value with no keys at all.
Logical payload: User { id = 42, name = "Ada", email = "ada@example.com" }
Bytes spent on keys, quotes, colons, commas: "id" "name" "email" {} : , = 21 of 49 bytes (43%)
Decoder must tokenize every byte, validate UTF-8, allocate strings, convert "42" -> int.
No keys. No quotes. No separators.
